use_cases: Dynamic landing page backgrounds with fluid wave animations
Hero section backdrops creating visual depth and movement
Full-page decorative effects for web applications
Immersive page backgrounds with real-time animation
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered animated background component featuring domain-warped wave patterns with fractal Brownian motion (fbm) noise. Renders a sophisticated ocean-like aesthetic with fluid motion, swirls, and time-based animation. Built with GLSL fragment shaders offering extensive customization through configurable parameters like zoom, amplitude, frequency, and color palette. Ideal for creating immersive hero sections and landing page backdrops.
